source: 传统中国星官体系(三垣二十八宿+近南极星区),本于《步天歌》《仪象考成》等古代星表;成员星位置据 Hipparcos 主星表(ESA 1997,J2000/ICRS)
method: 星官归属与连线依传统三垣二十八宿星官体系;各成员星按 Hipparcos 星号解析为 J2000 赤经赤纬(度);4 个非 Hipparcos 成员(1 暗星+3 深空星团)据现代恒星/星团目录 J2000 定位
groups: 三垣:紫微垣/太微垣/天市垣
二十八宿:东方七宿(青龙)/北方七宿(玄武)/西方七宿(白虎)/南方七宿(朱雀)
schema: asterisms[].{name,pinyin,english,group,symbol,region,mansion?,stars[{ra,decl,hip?,mag?}],lines[[i,j]]}; ra/decl 十进制度 J2000; lines index into stars[]
coverage: 312/312 Xingguan (100%) fully positioned, 1416 member stars. The 312 Xingguan = 289 三垣二十八宿 (incl. vassal/附 asterisms split out as separate line-groups; traditional charts count ~283) + 23 近南极星区 (late-Ming southern additions). All connection lines preserved.

asterisms.english: Canopy Support (Vassal of Canopy of the Emperor)

asterisms.english: Deified Judge of Right and Wrong

asterisms.name: 司危
asterisms.english: Deified Judge of Disaster and Good Fortune

asterisms.english: Judge for Estimating the Age of Animals

asterisms.english: Interior Seats of the Five Emperors

asterisms.name: 左更
asterisms.english: Official in Charge of the Forest
